tasks.check: deno fmt --check && deno lint && deno check **/*.ts && deno check **/*.tsx && deno task check:visual-baselines
tasks.pre-commit: deno task check:visual-baselines && deno task test:e2e:local
tasks.test:e2e: deno test -A tests/e2e/main_flows_e2e_test.ts && deno test -A tests/e2e/mutating_flows_e2e_test.ts
tasks.brand:upgrade: cp static/branding/upgrade/favicon.svg static/favicon.svg && cp static/branding/upgrade/icon.svg static/icon.svg && cp static/branding/upgrade/icon-512.png static/icon-512.png && cp static/branding/upgrade/icon-192.png static/icon-192.png && cp static/branding/upgrade/apple-touch-icon.png static/apple-touch-icon.png && cp static/branding/upgrade/manifest.json static/manifest.json
tasks.brand:production: cp static/branding/production/favicon.svg static/favicon.svg && cp static/branding/production/icon.svg static/icon.svg && cp static/branding/production/icon-512.png static/icon-512.png && cp static/branding/production/icon-192.png static/icon-192.png && cp static/branding/production/apple-touch-icon.png static/apple-touch-icon.png && cp static/branding/production/manifest.json static/manifest.json
tasks.mode:upgrade: deno task brand:upgrade && deno task stamp:upgrade && echo 'Mode set to: upgrade'
tasks.mode:production: deno task brand:production && deno task stamp:production && echo 'Mode set to: production'
